description: Natoma provides an enterprise platform for connecting AI clients and agents to business applications using MCP, with centralized access control, profiles, and auditability. Its docs describe distributing governed MCP connections and hosting custom MCP servers or MCPs generated from OpenAPI specs.
summary: Natoma exposes managed MCP server endpoints on `*.mcp.natoma.app` via shareable profile/connection URLs; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found for `natoma.ai`.
